Compact Series

All-In-One Solar Street Light

💡 Why This Option?

Ideal for residential streets, estate perimeter roads, filling station forecourts, and community compounds. Fast to install, low vandalism risk, and zero ongoing running costs.

Technical Highlights

What Makes It Work

📡 Smart PIR Motion Sensor — 5 to 12 Metres

Detection range covers 5–12 metres with a 120° sweep. Holds at 30% brightness when no movement is detected, then instantly ramps to full power the moment someone enters range. Extends battery life on cloudy days significantly.

☀️ Monocrystalline Silicon Panel — 23% Efficiency

Among the highest conversion rates in this product class. Tempered glass lamination protects against rain, dust and extreme heat — fully suited to Lagos conditions. Charges fully in 6–8 hours of good sunlight.

🔦 Imported Super Lumen LED Chips — 180 LM/W · 50,000 Hours

Over 13 years of nightly operation before any replacement is needed. Die-cast aluminium housing channels heat away from the chips, maintaining consistent brightness throughout the product's lifespan.

✅ Real Installations — Delivered & Working Across Nigeria

On-Ground Proof

We Don't Just Sell — We Install

These are not stock photos. These are sites we lit up — communities that were once dark, now bright every single night without spending a kobo on NEPA or generator fuel.

⚠️ Please Read Before Ordering

We work with serious buyers only. Once your order is confirmed and dispatch begins, we cannot offer refunds or hold stock. Be ready with your delivery address, confirmed quantity and payment before placing an order.

❌ Please don't order if you are not ready to pay and proceed immediately.
OPTION 2
High-Power Series

Separated Panel Solar Street Light

Designed for maximum output on wider roads, industrial compounds, community squares and government contracts. The solar panel mounts independently from the lamp head, maximising sun capture while the powerful LED array floods a wide area with brilliant white light.

600WPeak Power
IP65Waterproof
AUTODusk-to-Dawn
LiFeBattery Pack
15+ yrsLifespan
1545mm × 385mm × 43mm Lamp Head Dimensions

Ultra-thin at just 43mm deep. Aerodynamic aluminium body reduces wind resistance on high poles. Die-cast arm interface fits standard 60–76mm poles with adjustable mounting angles.

🔩 Die-Cast Aluminium Shell

High hardness integrated shell — not easily damaged. All edges sealed waterproof. Excellent heat dissipation and full corrosion/rust protection. Critical for coastal and high-humidity Lagos environments.

⚡ Pro-Double MPPT Controller

Intelligent MPPT solar charge controller with step-up LED driver. Auto-dimming, safety protection, all-weather lighting. Imported LED chips deliver high brightness, zero colour decay, and uniform illumination.

🌧️ IP65 · Heat & Cold Resistant

Sealed against dust and pressurised water jets. Withstands Lagos dry season heat and harmattan cold equally. Large-capacity lithium battery with over-discharge protection keeps it running through consecutive cloudy days.

🌙 Fully Automatic

Charges automatically during the day. Lights up at dusk. Zero human intervention. 18% better power output efficiency and up to 90% board-end conversion rate versus older panel types.

📦 DIRECT FACTORY SUPPLY

Container loads shipped directly from manufacturer to Lagos. No middleman. Bulk pricing for contractors and government projects.

More From JVSolar

Our Other Services

Beyond solar street lights, we are a full-spectrum clean energy company. Whatever your solar need, we have the expertise and the stock to deliver it across Nigeria.

☀️

Solar Panel Supply & Installation

We supply and install high-efficiency monocrystalline and polycrystalline solar panels for residential homes, commercial buildings, factories and estates across Nigeria. Whether it's a 1kW rooftop or a 100kW industrial array, we size it, supply it and install it to standard — anywhere in the country.

🔋

Solar Inverter Systems

Complete solar inverter systems for homes and businesses. We supply and install hybrid inverters, off-grid systems and grid-tied solutions. Brands we work with include Luminous, Felicity, Victron, Growatt and more. Say goodbye to generator noise and fuel costs permanently.

🪫

Battery Storage Solutions

We supply lithium-ion and gel battery banks to give your home or business extended power backup. Our team sizes the right battery capacity for your daily energy consumption so you're never left in the dark — across all 36 states and FCT.

🛠️

Solar System Maintenance & Repair

Is your existing solar system underperforming? Inverter faults, panel cleaning, battery replacement, wiring faults — our engineers diagnose and fix it. We also offer scheduled maintenance contracts nationwide to keep your system running at peak performance year-round.

🏗️

Estate & Community Solar Projects

We handle full estate solar electrification — street lighting, estate common area power, and individual home solar systems. We work directly with estate developers, facility managers and community leaders from survey to commissioning — anywhere in Nigeria.

🏛️

Government & Corporate Solar Contracts

We have the capacity to handle large-scale government and corporate solar contracts including street lighting for local governments, solar power for schools, hospitals, markets and public facilities. We operate nationwide and can mobilise our team to any state. Request a formal proposal and bill of quantities from us today.

Need any of these services? Talk to us today.
